gaps.question: Do local repo skills with agents/openai.yaml appear more reliably in the Codex picker than SKILL.md-only skills after sync and restart?
gaps.why_it_matters: Affects discoverability and whether metadata needs to be mandatory for future waves.
gaps.verification_task: Sync the new skills, inspect ~/.codex/skills, and confirm they are callable globally.

gaps.question: At what point do meta-skills become too verbose to justify their trigger cost?
gaps.why_it_matters: Prevents the new general-purpose skills from becoming persona-heavy or noisy.
gaps.verification_task: Use the new skills on real tasks and prune sections that do not change outputs.

gaps.question: Which framework-specific reviewer skills from the organizer deserve a second-wave implementation based on actual demand?
gaps.why_it_matters: Avoids creating narrow skills without real usage pressure.
gaps.verification_task: Track repeated asks for React, SPFx, FastAPI, SQL, or dashboard review before packaging wave 2.

gaps.question: Which wave 1 skills remain useful outside Codex with only SKILL.md and no agents/openai.yaml?
gaps.why_it_matters: Improves reuse if the user later shares the bundle with other agent clients.
gaps.verification_task: Keep SKILL.md self-sufficient and avoid Codex-only assumptions in the body.
